---
title: "CVD BPS"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```

## Importing Data

```{r}
# loading danish inputs, sex, LOD, BPS percentiles & ischemic heart disease prevalence
# fitting lognormal distribution from percentiles
df <- read_excel("danish bps cvd.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(
    meanlog_dk = log(p_50),
    sdlog_dk   = (log(p_75) - log(p_25)) / (qnorm(0.75) - qnorm(0.25))
  )
```

## Study inputs, BPS and CHD

```{r}
# Wang et al.: BPS tertiles and coronary heart disease (CHD)
OR_t2  <- 1.09
LCL_t2 <- 0.39
UCL_t2 <- 3.05

OR_t3  <- 2.22
LCL_t3 <- 1.04
UCL_t3 <- 4.74

# Convert 95% CI to log-scale SE, making it more symmetric
se_t2 <- (log(UCL_t2) - log(LCL_t2)) / (2 * 1.96)
se_t3 <- (log(UCL_t3) - log(LCL_t3)) / (2 * 1.96)
```

## Inputs for YLL/YLD

```{r}
# from GB<d denmark ischemic heart disease
yld_f <- 3995
yld_m <- 7428

yll_f <- 28510
yll_m <- 55737


# adding to dataframe
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    YLD_total = case_when(
      str_detect(group, "^Female") ~ yld_f,
      str_detect(group, "^Male")   ~ yld_m,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    YLL_total = case_when(
      str_detect(group, "^Female") ~ yll_f,
      str_detect(group, "^Male")   ~ yll_m,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    DALY_total = YLD_total + YLL_total
  )
```

## PAF

```{r}
paf_cat <- function(p_obs, rr, p_cf) {
  (sum(p_obs * rr) - sum(p_cf * rr)) / sum(p_obs * rr)
}

## p_obs = observed exposure-category proportions in the population
## rr = relative risk in each exposure category
## p_cf = counterfactual exposure distribution
```

## Monte Carlo

```{r}
run_mc_row_daly_chd <- function(p_isch, meanlog_dk, sdlog_dk, lod_dk,
                                YLD_total, YLL_total, DALY_total,
                                nsim = 10000,
                                baseline_uncertainty = FALSE) {
  
  # Simulate Danish BPS exposure
  X <- rlnorm(nsim, meanlog = meanlog_dk, sdlog = sdlog_dk)
  
  # Restrict to Danish detectable values
  X_det <- X[X > lod_dk]
  
  # NA if failing
  if (length(X_det) < 10) {
    return(tibble(
      p_detectable = NA_real_,
    P_ref = NA_real_,
    P_t2 = NA_real_,
    P_t3 = NA_real_,
    rr2 = NA_real_,
    rr3 = NA_real_,
    PAF = NA_real_,
    AP = NA_real_,
    AYLD = NA_real_,
    AYLL = NA_real_,
    ADALY = NA_real_
))
  }
  
  # Split detectable Danish exposures into tertiles
  q1 <- quantile(X_det, 1/3)
  q2 <- quantile(X_det, 2/3)
  
  grp <- case_when(
    X_det <= q1 ~ "T1",
    X_det <= q2 ~ "T2",
    TRUE ~ "T3"
  )
  
  # proportions among detectable
  p1 <- mean(grp == "T1")
  p2 <- mean(grp == "T2")
  p3 <- mean(grp == "T3")
  
  # Sample OR uncertainty once per iteration
  # OR is used here as an approximation to RR
  rr2 <- exp(rnorm(1, mean = log(OR_t2), sd = se_t2))
  rr3 <- exp(rnorm(1, mean = log(OR_t3), sd = se_t3))
  
  p_detectable <- length(X_det) / length(X)
  
  # Observed category proportions in full population
  P_t1 <- mean(grp == "T1") * p_detectable
  P_t2 <- mean(grp == "T2") * p_detectable
  P_t3 <- mean(grp == "T3") * p_detectable

  # Reference = below LOD + T1
  P_ref <- 1 - P_t2 - P_t3

  p_obs <- c(P_ref, P_t2, P_t3)
  rr    <- c(1, rr2, rr3)
  p_cf  <- c(1, 0, 0)

  PAF <- max(0, paf_cat(p_obs, rr, p_cf))
  
  # Attributable prevalent IHD cases
  base_prev <- if (baseline_uncertainty) {
    rpois(1, lambda = p_isch)
  } else {
    p_isch
  }
  
  AP <- PAF * base_prev
  
  # Attributable YLD, YLL, DALY
  AYLD <- PAF * YLD_total
  AYLL <- PAF * YLL_total
  ADALY <- PAF * DALY_total
  
  tibble(
  p_detectable = p_detectable,
  P_ref = P_ref,
  P_t2 = P_t2,
  P_t3 = P_t3,
  rr2 = rr2,
  rr3 = rr3,
  PAF = PAF,
  AP = AP,
  AYLD = AYLD,
  AYLL = AYLL,
  ADALY = ADALY
)
}
```

## Summary wrapper

```{r}
# inner simulation approximates the exposure distribution
# outer simulation approximates uncertainty in the final outputs
run_mc_summary_daly_chd <- function(p_isch, meanlog_dk, sdlog_dk, lod_dk,
                                    YLD_total, YLL_total, DALY_total,
                                    nsim_outer = 3000,
                                    baseline_uncertainty = FALSE) {
  
  sims <- map_dfr(seq_len(nsim_outer), ~ run_mc_row_daly_chd(
    p_isch = p_isch,
    meanlog_dk = meanlog_dk,
    sdlog_dk = sdlog_dk,
    lod_dk = lod_dk,
    YLD_total = YLD_total,
    YLL_total = YLL_total,
    DALY_total = DALY_total,
    nsim = 10000,
    baseline_uncertainty = baseline_uncertainty
  ))
  
    tibble(
  p_detectable_med = median(sims$p_detectable, na.rm = TRUE),
  P_ref_med = median(sims$P_ref, na.rm = TRUE),
  P_t2_med = median(sims$P_t2, na.rm = TRUE),
  P_t3_med = median(sims$P_t3, na.rm = TRUE),
  PAF_med = median(sims$PAF, na.rm = TRUE),
  PAF_lo = quantile(sims$PAF, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
  PAF_hi = quantile(sims$PAF, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
  AP_med = median(sims$AP, na.rm = TRUE),
  AP_lo = quantile(sims$AP, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
  AP_hi = quantile(sims$AP, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
  AYLD_med = median(sims$AYLD, na.rm = TRUE),
  AYLD_lo = quantile(sims$AYLD, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
  AYLD_hi = quantile(sims$AYLD, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
  AYLL_med = median(sims$AYLL, na.rm = TRUE),
  AYLL_lo = quantile(sims$AYLL, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
  AYLL_hi = quantile(sims$AYLL, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
  ADALY_med = median(sims$ADALY, na.rm = TRUE),
  ADALY_lo = quantile(sims$ADALY, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
  ADALY_hi = quantile(sims$ADALY, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
)
}
```

## Running the model

```{r}
results_daly_chd <- df %>%
  mutate(
    mc = pmap(
      list(p_isch, meanlog_dk, sdlog_dk, LOD, YLD_total, YLL_total, DALY_total),
      ~ run_mc_summary_daly_chd(
        p_isch = ..1,
        meanlog_dk = ..2,
        sdlog_dk = ..3,
        lod_dk = ..4,
        YLD_total = ..5,
        YLL_total = ..6,
        DALY_total = ..7,
        nsim_outer = 3000,
        baseline_uncertainty = FALSE
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  unnest(mc)

results_daly_chd
```
